zh.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin是Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild'和Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt的女兒，於1064年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾梅瑟利。她於1086年8月6日與Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維洛賀比結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1128年在英國林可爾史爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin是Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild'和Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt的女儿，于1064年出生在英国英格兰越可爾梅瑟利。她于1086年8月6日与Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維洛賀比结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1128年在英国林可爾史爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Meredith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Welsh male personal name . In recent years the name has been given to girls, especially in the United States, a choice possibly influenced by the female character so named in  Enid Bagnold's  novel National Velvet (  1935 ), which was made into a film (  1944 ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin was born in 1064, in Methley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' and Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt. She married Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell on 6 August 1086, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1128, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin est née en 1064, à Methley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' et Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt. Elle a épousé Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell le 6 août 1086, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1128, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin wurde 1064 in Methley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' und Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt geboren. Sie hat am 6. August 1086 in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1128 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin è nata il nel 1064 nel Methley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' e Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt. Lei sposato Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell il 6 agosto 1086, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1128, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdinは1064年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアメスリーでMyrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild'とMrs Myrrdin Wylltの娘として生まれた。1086年8月6日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーでKnight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1128年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin(은)는 1064년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 멧h리에서 Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild'(와)과 Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1086년 8월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1128년 영국 링코실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin nasceu em 1064, em Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' e Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt. Ela casou-se com Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell em 6 de agosto de 1086, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1128, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin родилась в 1064 г. в местности метли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' и Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell 6 августа 1086 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1128 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Meredith verch Myrrdin nació en 1064, en Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Myrrdin Wyllt 'The Wild' y Mrs Myrrdin Wyllt. Se casó con Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell el 6 de agosto de 1086, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1128, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
